sizing_rule.note: Use full position size if MAE falls within 0.25–0.40× stop distance (validates stop appropriateness); reduce position by 25% if MAE is outside this band (indicates misaligned stops). Stop method: 3× ATR or volatility-based.

source_rule_text: A trader should use Maximum Adverse Excursion (MAE) as a diagnostic metric to validate that initial stops are appropriately sized relative to normal price oscillation, ensuring stops are neither too tight (catching noise) nor misaligned with actual trade drawdowns.
